name: Julia
answer1:
Self
preservation is
the first law of
nature; self
sacrifice the
highest rule
of grace.
answer2:
Within this
house are many
poor and
destitute souls.
question: Wilt thou help?

name: Zircon
answer2:
Ah, yes, the
mystic weapons,
and armour, my
greatest work!
Those I gave
unto Sir Simon
and Lady Tessa.
question:
Seek thee
a weapon?

name: Bob the Beggar
health:
I am very sick,
help me!
answer1:
I need money
to cure my
sickness.
question:
Hast thou
any money?
yes:
Then please
share it
with me!
no:
Then join me and
we can beg
together!

name: Linda Sue
answer1:
I have not eaten
in days.
answer2:
Oh, thou art
a kind soul!
question:
Could thou spare
a nibble of
food?

name: Gimble
answer1:
I suffer from a
tsetse byte!
question:
Could thou spare
a gold piece so
I may buy a
last drink?
yes:
Remember Azure
knows of the
rune!

name: Jude
answer1:
I will not speak
of my sin!
question:
If I help thee
wilt thou swear
to only use it
at the mouth of
the abyss to
destroy it?
yes:
It can be found
at lat-P'F"
long-M'F" on the
darkest night!

name: Alkerion
job:
I am a peasant,
I hear many
things.
answer1:
What does thou
wish to know?
answer2:
The stone of
sacrifice is
orange in color
and used in the
altar rooms of
love and
courage!
question: Seeketh thou?

name: Mike Ward
job:
I am trying to
get a room.
answer1:
I have travelled
clear from
Skara Brae.
answer2:
The rune of our
city is missing!
question:
Know thee
of the rune?
yes:
It is the key to
the shrine of
spirituality!
no:
It is not in
Skara Brae.

name: Alex
job:
I give out
flowers. Here
you are!
answer1:
The way I figure
it, if thou art
kind to others
they will have
reason to be
kind in return!
answer2:
Yes, give all
that thou can
unto the needy!
question: Wilt thou give?

name: Shentis
job:
I welcome thee
unto Minoc, city
of sacrifice!
question:
Dost thou strive
for virtue?
yes:
Then perhaps
thou shalt
become an
avatar!

name: Singsong
answer2:
Very well,
the raven sings,
the raven saw
and in the corn
he sayeth 'CAH'.
question:
Dost thou
like it?

name: Damon
answer2:
Listen to the
bard's song for
in its verse
lies the key!
question:
Can't a man
just think
to himself?
no:
Oh, yes
I can thou
bandersnatch!

name: Mischief
answer2:
The rune of
sacrifice is
hard to get. It
lies within the
fires of the
forge!
question:
Hast thou
the rune?
yes:
Then ask
Alkerion of the
stone!
no:
Return when thou
dost find it!

name: Azure
answer1:
I carve runes
for passage into
the shrines!
question:
Dost thou
seek a rune?

name: Merida
job:
I seek the
wisdom of the
shrine of
sacrifice.
answer1:
But first I need
the mantra!
answer2:
I am told that a
hidden shepherd
knows the
mantra.
question:
Know ye
the mantra?
no:
The shrine is on
a lake to the
east!

name: a guard
answer1:
I often wonder
if I will ever
have to give my
life in the line
of duty.
question:
Understand
my dilemma?
yes:
Of course, if it
came down to it,
I hope I would
do it!
